name: Activity Digest Rollup
description: Single consolidated email every 3 hours summarizing everything that happened across the agent fleet — shipped recs, queued recs, deferred recs, failed runs, eBay catalog growth, articles published, H2H pairs proposed, and any escalations. Replaces the per-agent confirmation/proposal/completion emails (which are now suppressed via DIGEST_ONLY=1). Reads digest-queue/*.json (left there by individual agents' suppressed emails) and walks recent runs.
